compiled_state.title: ticket CLI: transition requires 3 positional args -> agents call with 2 and get cryptic error
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Agents frequently call `.claude/scripts/dso ticket transition <id> <target_status>` (2 args) instead of the required 3-arg form `.claude/scripts/dso ticket transition <id> <current_status> <target_status>`. The error message is cryptic ('Usage: ticket transition ...') with no indication that current_status is required as positional arg. CLAUDE.md references the command but the example in the quick reference table only shows the full form without flagging that both current and target status are required positional args. Needs either: (1) a clearer CLAUDE.md rule in the 'Always Do These' section citing the exact 3-arg form with a warning, or (2) an update to dso:using-lockpick with explicit examples of the correct syntax, or (3) a defensive wrapper in the CLI that accepts 2-arg form and looks up current status automatically.

comments.body:
During sprint initialization for epic a171-6c65, I attempted to transition the epic to in_progress using:

  .claude/scripts/dso ticket transition a171-6c65 in_progress

This failed immediately with the error: 'Usage: ticket transition <ticket_id> <current_status> <target_status>'

The root cause: I used a 3-argument form (ticket_id + target_status) instead of the required 4-argument form (ticket_id + current_status + target_status). The CLI requires optimistic concurrency control — callers must explicitly state the ticket's current status before the target status, which both prevents race conditions and makes the transition intent explicit.

I found the correct syntax by reading plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md, which clearly documents the required signature: '.claude/scripts/dso ticket transition <ticket_id> <current_status> <target_status>'. The CLAUDE.md rule 16 requires consulting this reference before any ticket command, which I should have done before my first attempt. The correct call was:

  .claude/scripts/dso ticket transition a171-6c65 open in_progress

This succeeded on the second attempt.
comments.author: Test
